sentences.english: Describe a teacher who had a significant influence on your life.
sentences.korean: 당신의 삶에 중요한 영향을 준 선생님을 묘사하세요.

sentences.english: Explain how this teacher affected you.
The teacher who had the biggest influence on me was my middle school science teacher.
sentences.korean: 나에게 가장 큰 영향을 준 선생님은 중학교 과학 선생님이었어요.

sentences.english: Instead of just lecturing from a textbook he made every class interactive by having us conduct real experiments.
sentences.korean: 교과서로 강의만 하는 대신 실제 실험을 하게 해서 모든 수업을 상호작용적으로 만들었어요.

sentences.english: He also stayed after school to help any student who was struggling.
sentences.korean: 어려움을 겪는 학생을 돕기 위해 방과 후에도 남아 계셨어요.

sentences.english: Because of him I developed a love for science that eventually led me to study biology in university.
sentences.korean: 덕분에 과학에 대한 사랑이 생겼고 결국 대학에서 생물학을 공부하게 됐어요.

sentences.english: He taught me that a great teacher doesn't just transfer knowledge — they ignite curiosity.
sentences.korean: 그는 훌륭한 교사는 단지 지식을 전달하는 것이 아니라 호기심에 불을 붙이는 것이라고 가르쳐줬어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Longer Vacations vs. Shorter Frequent Breaks
